functions.name: extra
functions.signature: itasca.flowknotarray.extra(slot: int) -> array float{flowplane} or float{flowplane,3}
functions.description: Get the flowplane extra data in the given slot as an array. Extra variables accessed by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: ids
functions.description: Get the flowplane ids as an array.

functions.name: in_group
functions.description: Return block group membership as a Boolean array.

functions.name: set_extra
functions.signature: itasca.flowknotarray.set_extra(slot: int, data: array float{flowplane} or float{flowplane, 3}) -> None
functions.description: Set the flowplane extra data in the given slot with an array. Extra variables set by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: set_group
functions.signature: itasca.flowknotarray.set_group(membership: array bool{nflowknot}, group_name: str, slot="default") -> None
functions.description: Set block group from an array. Where membership True set the corresponding block to be a member of group group_name in the given slot.
